series_metadata.series_title: Journal of the Department of Tax Equalization
series_metadata.series_description: This is a bound journalized record of the proceedings of the Department of Tax Equalization, contaning the departments entries concerning school bond issues, fund transfers, time extensions, public hearing notices, authority to employ, adoption of rules, assignment of tax receipts to local government fund. Prescribing forms, approval of real property abstract, and any other proceeding that is a matter of public record.
